hub:17.title: Bình Lợi
hub:17.note: 1895 ferry landing ('Appontement de Binh Loï') at the same crossing the bridge now spans (±400 m).

hub:15.title: Thanh Đa
hub:15.note: The Thanh Đa river loop is the softest 1895 anchor (±600 m); read it as the shape of the peninsula, not a precise line.

hub:1.title: Hàng Xanh
hub:1.note: The diagonal Gia Định spoke on the 1895 map runs toward here — approximate road direction only (±400 m).

hub:20.title: Chợ Bà Chiểu
hub:20.note: 'Cho-Ba-Chieu' sits in the 1895 interior at district-center scale (±400 m), not block scale.

hub:18.title: Lăng Ông
hub:18.note: The Lăng Ông / Bà Chiểu zone predates 1895; its general area matches, not a precise pin (±400 m).

hub:3.title: Thị Nghè
hub:3.note: The Thị Nghè waterway axis is traceable on the 1895 map; the exact alignment has shifted with land-filling (±400 m).

hub:8.title: Cầu Bông
hub:8.note: CAVEAT: in 1895 this canal was a different channel ('Rạch Cầu Sơn'); the modern Nhiêu Lộc–Thị Nghè canal post-dates 20th-c. land-filling. The name survived, the waterway did not (±400 m).
